schema_reference_for_dev: Engine #625 emit `[[<text>,null,null,[],[]]]` is WRONG. Native inner_json must be `[null,[c_id,r_id],null,null,[[["rc_<hash>",[<text>],null,null,null,null,true,null,[1],"en",...meta...]],...]]` -- text is nested at inner[4][0][1][0], NOT at inner[0][0]. Conversation/response IDs (c_*, r_*) are MANDATORY at inner[1].

notes: Cycle 95 Phase B native schema capture for inner_json reverse-engineering. Successful capture of 19KB native Gemini wrb.fr response with full 13-chunk structure. files/626/response_body.txt is the gold reference for next engine fix iteration. Subagent 6m, exceeded 5min soft.
